instruction: Grind 9g of house blend to a fine espresso grind.
Tamp evenly and lock the portafilter into the group head.
Pull the shot for 25-30 seconds and serve immediately.
Grind and pull a double shot, 18g in, into the serving cup.
Steam 100ml of whole milk to a dense, thick microfoam.
Pour the milk to fill the cup, holding back the foam.
Spoon the reserved foam on top for a deep, even cap.
Grind and pull a double shot, 18g in, into the serving cup.
Steam 220ml of whole milk to a smooth, light microfoam.
Pour the milk in a steady stream to build the layered look.
Finish with a thin foam cap and serve right away.
Fill a serving glass with 100g of ice.
Grind and pull a double shot, 18g in, into a separate cup.
Pour 200ml of cold whole milk over the ice.
Pour the espresso over the top last so it layers, then stir before serving.
Sift 4g of ceremonial matcha into the cup to remove clumps.
Whisk with a small splash of hot water into a smooth paste.
Steam 200ml of whole milk and pour in gently, whisking briefly to combine.
